category_sources: source_facts.description says it zaps words by typing them correctly; official homepage describes a typing game with single-player and multiplayer modes.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is typespeed; official homepage title is Typespeed.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official project site and includes About, Download, Release Notes, and Reporting Bugs sections; no separate official docs surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage and SourceForge files page provide release source archives/downloads but no current official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions typing words correctly; official homepage says it is written in C, uses curses, supports POSIX systems, and has single-player and multiplayer modes.
